sources.title: The Other Hell 1980
sources.description: Father Valerio is sent to investigate a monastery after the disappearance of several nuns, however things are far more complicated than they appear to be.

metadata.Plot: A priest investagates paranormal activity at a nuns' convent where a deep, dark secret is about to resurface in the guise of murder! Could the devil be behind this, or is that just what Mother Superior wants everyone to believe?
metadata.Actors: Franca Stoppi, Carlo De Mejo, Francesca Carmeno
